an2.35:1.1:
1
Then the householder Anāthapiṇḍika approached the Blessed One,
paid homage to him, sat down to one side, and said to him:
an2.35:2.1: "Who in the world, Bhante, is worthy of offerings, and where is a gift to be given?"
an2.35:2.2:
"There are, householder, two in the world worthy of offerings: the trainee and the one beyond training.
These are the two in the world worthy of offerings and a gift is to be gIV. Untamedto them."
an2.35:2.3:
2
This is what the Blessed One said. Having said this, the Fortunate One, the Teacher, further said this:
